name: Views vs Precomputed Summary Tables
description: Compare a live view against a precomputed summary table; understand the tradeoffs

checks.name: v_daily_revenue is a VIEW
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'v_daily_revenue' AND table_type = 'VIEW';
checks.description: v_daily_revenue must be created as a VIEW, not a TABLE

checks.name: v_daily_revenue Jan 10 total = 1059.97
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue FROM v_daily_revenue WHERE order_date = '2025-01-10';

checks.name: summary_daily_revenue has 4 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM summary_daily_revenue;
checks.description: 4 distinct order dates: Jan 10, Jan 12, Jan 15, Feb 01

checks.name: Monthly Brazil revenue = 1209.92
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue FROM summary_monthly_store_revenue WHERE month = 1 AND country = 'Brazil';
